title: NxAFKZone
description: Create AFK zones that reward players automatically while standing inside.
body:
## 💤 NxAFKZone – Advanced AFK Zone Rewards Plugin

**NxAFKZone** is a lightweight and fully configurable **AFK Zone reward system** for **Spigot / Paper 1.21+** servers.
Create AFK zones using a wand, display a **center-screen timer**, and automatically reward players who stay AFK inside the zone.

Perfect for **SMP, Survival, Economy, and AFK farms**.

---

## ✨ Features

* 🪄 **Easy AFK Zone Creation**

  * Use `/afkzone wand` to get a **Golden Hoe**
  * Left Click → Set Pos1
  * Right Click → Set Pos2
  * `/afkzone create <name>`

* ⏱️ **Center Screen AFK Timer**

  * Large **on-screen display** (not chat spam)
  * Shows remaining time (e.g. `01:00`)
  * Automatically restarts after reward

* 🎁 **Command-Based Rewards**

  * Run **multiple reward commands**
  * Fully configurable via `config.yml`
  * Supports `{player}` placeholder

* ⚙️ **Highly Configurable**

  * Timer duration
  * Reward commands
  * Messages & titles
  * Enable/disable features easily

* 🚀 **Optimized & Lightweight**

  * No lag
  * No dependencies
  * Paper & Spigot compatible

---

## 📌 Commands

| Command                  | Description                 |
| ------------------------ | --------------------------- |
| `/afkzone wand`          | Get AFK Zone selection wand |
| `/afkzone create <name>` | Create a new AFK Zone       |
| `/afkzone delete <name>` | Delete an AFK Zone          |
| `/afkzone list`          | List all AFK Zones          |
| `/afkzone help`          | Show help menu              |

---

## 🔐 Permissions

```text
nxafkzone.admin
```

---

## 🧩 Requirements

* Java **17+**
* **Spigot / Paper 1.21+**

---

## 📂 Default Rewards (Example)

```yaml
rewards:
  - "give {player} iron_ingot 1"
  - "give {player} diamond 1"
  - "give {player} gold_block 1"
```

---

## 👨‍💻 Developer

* **Author:** NotRenzo
* **Plugin Name:** NxAFKZone

---

## 💬 Support & Feedback

If you find a bug or want new features, feel free to report it on Modrinth or your support Discord.
